docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.title: Install
docs.text:
git clone https://github.com/username/my-docs.git
cd my-docs
pip install -r requirements.txt

docs.title: This is a test template
docs.text:
Warning

Back up your configuration before making changes.

Note

This is a note explaining an important detail that may help you understand the topic.

Tip

Follow the recommended workflow to avoid common mistakes and save time.

Warning

Changing these settings may require restarting the application.

Danger

Deleting this directory is permanent and cannot be undone.

Success

Your configuration has been validated and saved successfully.

Info

This feature is available in version 2.0 and later.

Example

Example:

server:
  host: localhost
  port: 8080

This configuration starts the server on localhost using port 8080.

Click to expand

This content is hidden until the reader clicks the title.

You can include multiple paragraphs, lists, or even code blocks.

print("Hello, world!")
Expanded by default

This content is visible when the page loads.

  • Install Python
  • Install Git
  • Deploy website
